text.title: TypeScript Strict Mode — Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed when typescript-strict-mode is mis-applied, each with symptom, root cause, and concrete fix.

antipattern.reason: Root cause: No type checking; runtime errors. Fix: Replace with unknown + type guards or concrete types.
Root cause: Hides real errors; impossible to audit. Fix: // @ts-expect-error[code] // reason: why.
Root cause: Whole chain typed as any; silent. Fix: Type x as unknown; narrow with type guards.
Root cause: Hides intent; calls vanish; silent no-ops in prod. Fix: Explicit if (obj == null) { handle } else obj.method().
Root cause: Trust the network; bugs ship. Fix: Pipe response.json() through schema.parse.
